    - "CPOL sets idle SCLK level when busy=0."
    - "CPHA selects first action edge; sampling and launching alternate each active edge."

power:
  domains:
    - { name: "PD_MAIN", supply: "VDD", description: "Primary logic domain for APB/SPI core" }
  power_states:
    - { name: "ON", description: "Clock active, transfers allowed when enabled" }
    - { name: "IDLE", description: "No active frame; static outputs per CS_IDLE/CPOL" }
    - { name: "RESET", description: "PRESETn asserted; state cleared" }
  clock_gating:
    - "Optional internal clock enable may gate shift datapath when busy=0; APB register interface remains responsive."

security:
  classification: "non-cryptographic peripheral control"
  assets:
    - "Correct APB register access policy"
    - "Integrity of serialized command/data words"
    - "Integrity of interrupt/error telemetry"
  threat_model:
    - { threat: "malformed APB accesses", mitigation: "PSLVERR + illegal_access sticky logging" }
    - { threat: "protocol misuse via illegal cs_sel/data_width", mitigation: "frame suppression + mode_fault sticky" }
    - { threat: "silent data loss in FIFO overflow", mitigation: "sticky overrun status + interrupt visibility" }
  assumptions:
    - "Trust boundary is SoC APB fabric; no authentication/crypto in this IP"

error_handling:
  error_sources:
    - { name: "tx_overrun", detect: "TXDATA write when tx_full=1", latch: "sticky STATUS/INT_PENDING", clear: "INT_CLEAR W1C" }
    - { name: "rx_overrun", detect: "RX FIFO full at frame completion", latch: "sticky STATUS/INT_PENDING", clear: "INT_CLEAR W1C" }
    - { name: "rx_underrun", detect: "RXDATA read while rx_empty=1", latch: "sticky STATUS/INT_PENDING", clear: "INT_CLEAR W1C" }
    - { name: "mode_fault", detect: "launch request with illegal cs_sel or illegal frame width", latch: "sticky STATUS/INT_PENDING", clear: "INT_CLEAR W1C" }
    - { name: "illegal_access", detect: "invalid APB addr/byte strobe/access policy", latch: "sticky STATUS/INT_PENDING", clear: "INT_CLEAR W1C" }
  propagation:
    - "APB access errors assert PSLVERR on offending transfer and set illegal_access sticky."
    - "Operational errors set STATUS sticky bits and corresponding INT_PENDING bits."
    - "irq_o reflects masked pending sources immediately after register update edge."
  recovery:
    - "Software clears sticky bits through INT_CLEAR W1C."
    - "soft_reset pulse clears FIFOs, busy, done, and sticky bits without requiring global reset."
    - "Global PRESETn resets all architectural state and outputs to idle defaults."

debug_observability:
  waveform_must_probe:
    - "PCLK, PRESETn"
    - "PSEL, PENABLE, PWRITE, PADDR, PWDATA, PRDATA, PREADY, PSLVERR"
    - "ctrl_enable, start_pulse, cpol, cpha, lsb_first, continuous_cs, loopback"
    - "busy, done_event, mode_fault, illegal_access"
    - "tx_fifo_level, rx_fifo_level, tx_push, tx_pop, rx_push, rx_pop"
    - "sclk_o, mosi_o, miso_i, csn_o, bit_index, shift_reg_tx, shift_reg_rx"
    - "int_mask, int_pending_raw, irq_o"
  trace_events:
    - { id: "EV_APB_ACCESS", trigger: "each APB transfer", payload: "addr, write, data, pslverr" }
    - { id: "EV_FRAME_LAUNCH", trigger: "legal launch accepted", payload: "cs_sel, frame_bits, mode bits" }
    - { id: "EV_FRAME_COMPLETE", trigger: "frame completion", payload: "rx_word, overrun flags, done" }
    - { id: "EV_ERROR", trigger: "any sticky error sets", payload: "error source bitmap" }
    - { id: "EV_INT_UPDATE", trigger: "INT_PENDING or INT_MASK change", payload: "pending, mask, irq" }

integration:
  bus_attachment:
    bus: "APB-lite"
    role: "slave"
    address_map_owner: "SoC integration"
    register_window_bytes: 0x100
  dependencies:
    - "Requires stable PCLK and PRESETn meeting async-assert/sync-deassert assumption"
    - "External SPI slave timing must be compatible with generated sclk_o"
    - "SoC software configures legal frame widths and CS index"
  connections:
    - { from_module: "spi", from_port: "PCLK", to_module: "spi_regs", to_port: "PCLK", signal: "PCLK" }
    - { from_module: "spi_regs", from_port: "ctrl_mode", to_module: "spi_shift", to_port: "ctrl_mode", signal: "ctrl_mode_bus" }
    - { from_module: "spi_fifo", from_port: "tx_pop_data", to_module: "spi_shift", to_port: "tx_word_i", signal: "tx_word" }
    - { from_module: "spi_shift", from_port: "rx_word_o", to_module: "spi_fifo", to_port: "rx_push_data", signal: "rx_word" }
    - { from_module: "spi_shift", from_port: "event_flags", to_module: "spi_int", to_port: "raw_events", signal: "int_raw_events" }

dft:
  scan_required: true
  controllability:
    - "All flops in scan chain except optional hardened FIFO macros"
    - "soft_reset and PRESETn provide deterministic initialization paths"
  observability:
    - "STATUS/DEBUG registers expose key internal progress and error state"
    - "irq_o and INT_PENDING provide event visibility"
  mbist: "Not required for register/FIFO-based implementation in this revision"

synthesis:
  dialect: "systemverilog_2012"
  constraints:
    - "Single clock PCLK at 100MHz"
    - "False path from async PRESETn assertion path to synchronous logic timing checks as per flow"
    - "No generated clock constraints for sclk_o internal logic since it is not an internal clock"
  required_outputs:
    - "gate-level netlist"
    - "area report"
    - "timing report"
    - "power estimate"

pnr:
  utilization_pct: 65
  aspect_ratio: 1.0
  core_space_um: 1.5
  global_density: 0.65
  io_layers: { horizontal: "met3", vertical: "met2" }
  cts: { buf_list: ["generic_clkbuf_small", "generic_clkbuf_large"] }
  routing: { signal_layers: { min: "met1", max: "met5" }, drc_waivers: [] }

coding_rules:
  verilog_style: "systemverilog_2012"
  file_extension: ".sv"
  parameter_header: "rtl/spi_param.vh"
  conventions:
    - "Use nonblocking assignments in sequential always blocks"
    - "Use blocking assignments in combinational logic"
    - "No inferred latches"
    - "All sequential state clocked only by PCLK"
    - "Reset style async assert/sync deassert for PRESETn"
  lint_waivers:
    - "UNUSEDSIGNAL for optional debug-only probes in synthesis-off blocks"

reuse_modules: []

custom:
  assumptions:
    - "APB slave responds with zero or one wait state only; no long stall insertion required."
    - "CTRL.start is implemented as write-pulse semantic and does not need software clear."
    - "continuous_cs hold applies only when consecutive launches target same cs_sel and legal frame config."
    - "CS_IDLE reset value drives all csn_o high for up to 8 CS bits; unused bits ignored when NUM_CS < 8."
  note: "Assumptions are conservative and can be tightened in later SSOT revisions without interface changes."

dir_structure:
  template_dirs:
    rtl: "templates/rtl/"
    sim: "templates/sim/"
  output_dirs:
    rtl: "rtl/"
    sim: "sim/"
    firmware: "firmware/"
    docs: "docs/"
  yaml_dir: "yaml/"
  generators_dir: "generators/"

filelist:
  headers:
    - "rtl/spi_param.vh"
  rtl:
    - "rtl/spi.sv"
    - "rtl/spi_regs.sv"
    - "rtl/spi_fifo.sv"
    - "rtl/spi_clkgen.sv"
    - "rtl/spi_shift.sv"
    - "rtl/spi_int.sv"
  sim:
    - "sim/tb_top.sv"
    - "sim/tb_apb_agent.sv"
    - "sim/tb_spi_slave_model.sv"
    - "sim/spi_ref_model.py"
  firmware:
    - "firmware/spi_regs.h"
  docs:
    - "docs/spi_register_map.md"
    - "docs/spi_programming_guide.md"

test_requirements:
  scenarios:
    - { id: "SC_APB_CONFIG", name: "APB config and readback", stimulus: "Write CTRL/PRESCALE/INT_MASK/CS_IDLE and read back RW fields", expected: "Readback matches written values; RO fields stable", checker: "APB scoreboard register mirror compare", coverage: ["register_access", "illegal_access_negative"] }
    - { id: "SC_BASIC_TRANSFER", name: "Basic full-duplex frame", stimulus: "Queue one TX word and start with default mode", expected: "One frame shifted and one RX word captured", checker: "Bit-accurate reference model compares MOSI/MISO and RXDATA", coverage: ["function_model.transactions.FM_FRAME_LAUNCH", "function_model.transactions.FM_FRAME_COMPLETE"] }
    - { id: "SC_CPOL_CPHA_SWEEP", name: "CPOL/CPHA sweep", stimulus: "Run transfers for all 4 SPI modes", expected: "Launch/sample edges follow mode timing", checker: "Cycle checker for edge placement and sampled bits", coverage: ["cycle_model.handshake_rules", "fsm.channel_level"] }
    - { id: "SC_LSB_FIRST", name: "LSB-first transfer", stimulus: "Set lsb_first=1 and transfer known pattern", expected: "Observed bit order reversed versus MSB mode", checker: "Serial monitor compares bit sequence", coverage: ["bit_order"] }
    - { id: "SC_WIDTH_VARIANTS", name: "Frame width sweep", stimulus: "Program widths 4,8,16,24,32 and transfer", expected: "Exactly configured number of bits shifted/sampled", checker: "bit_index and done timing assertions", coverage: ["data_width_legal_space"] }
    - { id: "SC_FIFO_LIMITS", name: "FIFO over/under-run behavior", stimulus: "Overflow TX writes, overflow RX completion, empty RX read", expected: "Discard rules and sticky flags set per spec", checker: "Status/interrupt sticky assertions", coverage: ["tx_overrun", "rx_overrun", "rx_underrun"] }
    - { id: "SC_INT_W1C", name: "Interrupt mask and W1C semantics", stimulus: "Trigger events, toggle masks, write INT_CLEAR", expected: "irq_o equals OR(INT_PENDING&INT_MASK); sticky clear by W1C; level bits not W1C-cleared", checker: "Interrupt functional checker", coverage: ["interrupt_paths", "w1c_behavior"] }
    - { id: "SC_ERROR_PATHS", name: "Mode fault and illegal APB access", stimulus: "Use illegal cs_sel/data_width and invalid APB accesses", expected: "Frame suppressed for mode fault; PSLVERR on illegal access", checker: "Protocol/error assertions", coverage: ["mode_fault", "illegal_access"] }
    - { id: "SC_PRESCALE_TIMING", name: "Prescale timing accuracy", stimulus: "Program multiple divisors and run frames", expected: "SCLK half-period equals divisor+1 PCLK cycles", checker: "Waveform timing measurement checker", coverage: ["prescale_timing"] }
    - { id: "SC_LOOPBACK_DEBUG", name: "Loopback and debug observability", stimulus: "Enable loopback and run back-to-back frames", expected: "RX data mirrors MOSI stream and debug fields/probes are coherent", checker: "Debug register/probe correlation checker", coverage: ["debug_observability", "continuous_cs"] }
  scoreboard_checks: 22
  coverage_goals:
    function:
      target_pct: 100
      model: "function_model"
      bins:
        - { id: "FCOV_TX_PUSH_ACCEPT", source_ref: "function_model.transactions.FM_APB_TX_PUSH", class: "transaction", description: "TXDATA accepted path" }
        - { id: "FCOV_LAUNCH_LEGAL", source_ref: "function_model.transactions.FM_FRAME_LAUNCH", class: "transaction", description: "Legal frame launch" }
        - { id: "FCOV_LAUNCH_MODE_FAULT", source_ref: "function_model.transactions.FM_FRAME_LAUNCH.error_cases", class: "error", description: "Illegal launch suppressed" }
        - { id: "FCOV_RX_POP_EMPTY", source_ref: "function_model.transactions.FM_APB_RX_POP.error_cases", class: "error", description: "RX underrun path" }
    cycle:
      target_pct: 100
      model: "cycle_model"
      bins:
        - { id: "CCOV_APB_TRANSFER", source_ref: "cycle_model.handshake_rules", class: "handshake", description: "APB transfer timing" }
        - { id: "CCOV_SPI_PIPELINE", source_ref: "cycle_model.pipeline", class: "pipeline_stage", description: "All SPI stages visited" }
        - { id: "CCOV_ORDERING_DONE_AFTER_SAMPLE", source_ref: "cycle_model.ordering", class: "ordering", description: "Completion ordering rule" }
        - { id: "CCOV_FSM_STATES", source_ref: "fsm.channel_level.states", class: "fsm", description: "FSM state/transition coverage" }
    code: "verilator line >= 90%, branch >= 85%; pyslang static parse/lint clean"
    observability_mapping: "sim_debug VCD/FST traces must include debug_observability.waveform_must_probe and show event correlation for trace_events"

quality_gates:
  ssot:
    pass: "check_ssot_disk.sh passes with all required sections and non-placeholder semantics"
    evidence: ["workflow/ssot-gen/scripts/check_ssot_disk.sh spi output", "spi/yaml/spi.ssot.yaml"]
  rtl_gen:
    profile: "standard"
    pass: "Manifest-owned modules implement assigned refs with no unresolved ownership conflicts"
    evidence: ["rtl/rtl_todo_plan.json", "rtl/rtl_authoring_provenance.json"]
  rtl:
    pass: "RTL compiles/lints and matches function_model/cycle_model behavior"
    evidence: ["compile.log", "lint/report.txt", "sim/fl_rtl_goal_audit.json"]
  dv:
    pass: "All mandatory scenarios execute with pass status and scoreboard clean"
    evidence: ["sim/regression_results.json", "sim/scoreboard_report.json"]
  coverage:
    pass: "Function and cycle coverage bins close to declared targets; code coverage meets intent or has approved waivers"
    evidence: ["cov/coverage.json", "sim/coverage_report.md"]
  eda:
    pass: "Synthesis/STA/PnR complete with timing closure at target clock or approved waiver"
    evidence: ["syn/report.rpt", "sta/summary.rpt", "pnr/report.rpt"]
  signoff:
    pass: "All prior gates passed and open critical bugs are zero"
    evidence: ["signoff/checklist.md", "bug_tracker/export.json"]

traceability:
  yaml_to_output:
    - { yaml: "top_module", output: "rtl/spi.sv top entity" }
    - { yaml: "parameters", output: "rtl/spi_param.vh and module parameters" }
    - { yaml: "io_list.interfaces", output: "Top-level ports and protocol adapters" }
    - { yaml: "registers.register_list", output: "spi_regs.sv, firmware headers, register docs" }
    - { yaml: "function_model.transactions", output: "spi_shift.sv behavior and reference scoreboard" }
    - { yaml: "cycle_model", output: "cycle-accurate handshake and timing assertions/checkers" }
    - { yaml: "interrupts", output: "spi_int.sv and irq behavior tests" }
    - { yaml: "timing", output: "sdc/spi.sdc and STA checks" }
    - { yaml: "power", output: "power intent assumptions and power report review" }
    - { yaml: "security", output: "negative tests and illegal access handling" }
    - { yaml: "error_handling", output: "sticky flags, PSLVERR logic, recovery tests" }
    - { yaml: "debug_observability", output: "waveform probe set and trace logging" }
    - { yaml: "test_requirements.scenarios", output: "tb sequences/regression matrix" }

workflow_todos:
  fl-model-gen:
    - id: "FL_SPI_REF_001"
      content: "Build executable SPI reference model from function_model transactions"
      detail: "Implement FIFO queues, launch gating, CPOL/CPHA edge semantics, bit-ordering, sticky/level interrupt behavior"
      criteria: ["Model reproduces all scenario expected outcomes", "Model emits comparable transaction/event log for RTL equivalence"]
      source_refs: ["function_model", "cycle_model", "registers.register_list", "interrupts"]
      priority: "high"
      required: true
      owner_module: "spi_shift"
      owner_file: "rtl/spi_shift.sv"
  rtl-gen:
    - id: "RTL_SPI_REGS_001"
      content: "Implement APB CSR block with strict access-policy and PSLVERR behavior"
      detail: "Decode 0x00..0x24 map, enforce RO/WO/RW policy, validate PSTRB support, produce STATUS/DEBUG views, and generate start/soft_reset pulses"
      criteria: ["All register fields match reset/access semantics", "Illegal accesses assert PSLVERR and set illegal_access", "INT_CLEAR W1C semantics implemented"]
      source_refs: ["registers.register_list", "error_handling", "cycle_model.handshake_rules"]
      priority: "high"
      required: true
      owner_module: "spi_regs"
      owner_file: "rtl/spi_regs.sv"
    - id: "RTL_SPI_FIFO_002"
      content: "Implement parameterized TX/RX synchronous FIFOs and occupancy exports"
      detail: "Instantiate depth/width parameterized FIFOs, tx/rx full-empty flags, push/pop arbitration, and overrun/underrun trigger hooks"
      criteria: ["FIFO depth obeys FIFO_DEPTH parameter", "STATUS tx/rx level bits reflect true occupancy", "Overflow/underflow behavior matches function_model"]
      source_refs: ["memory.instances", "dataflow", "function_model.transactions.FM_APB_TX_PUSH", "function_model.transactions.FM_APB_RX_POP"]
      priority: "high"
      required: true
      owner_module: "spi_fifo"
      owner_file: "rtl/spi_fifo.sv"
    - id: "RTL_SPI_SHIFT_003"
      content: "Implement shift/sample FSM, mode handling, and CS behavior"
      detail: "Create launch gating, CPOL/CPHA edge sequencing, MSB/LSB order logic, bit_index tracking, continuous_cs hold, and loopback path"
      criteria: ["FSM states and transitions satisfy fsm section", "SCLK not used as internal clock", "Frame completion and RX push ordering matches cycle_model.ordering"]
      source_refs: ["fsm.channel_level", "cycle_model.pipeline", "cycle_model.ordering", "function_model.transactions"]
      priority: "high"
      required: true
      owner_module: "spi_shift"
      owner_file: "rtl/spi_shift.sv"
    - id: "RTL_SPI_CLKGEN_004"
      content: "Implement prescale-based SCLK waveform generator"
      detail: "Generate sclk_o from PCLK with half-period divisor+1, support CPOL idle behavior, and provide edge strobes to shift engine"
      criteria: ["Measured half-period follows PRESCALE", "CPOL idle level maintained when idle", "No combinational glitches on csn/sclk transitions violating ordering"]
      source_refs: ["registers.PRESCALE", "cycle_model.handshake_rules", "timing.protocol_timing"]
      priority: "medium"
      required: true
      owner_module: "spi_clkgen"
      owner_file: "rtl/spi_clkgen.sv"
    - id: "RTL_SPI_INT_005"
      content: "Implement pending/mask/clear interrupt controller and irq_o reduction"
      detail: "Maintain sticky and level pending sources, W1C clear for sticky subset, and combinational masked OR output"
      criteria: ["irq_o == OR(INT_PENDING & INT_MASK)", "Level sources unaffected by W1C", "Sticky sources clear on INT_CLEAR bit write"]
      source_refs: ["interrupts", "registers.INT_MASK", "registers.INT_PENDING", "registers.INT_CLEAR"]
      priority: "high"
      required: true
      owner_module: "spi_int"
      owner_file: "rtl/spi_int.sv"

      source_refs: ["test_requirements.coverage_goals", "fsm.channel_level", "function_model.transactions", "cycle_model"]
      priority: "high"

  syn:

      content: "Run synthesis with single-clock constraints"

      priority: "medium"
      required: true
  pnr:
    - id: "PNR_SPI_001"
      content: "Execute floorplan/place/route per pnr targets"

  sta:

  sta-post:

generation_flow:
  steps:
    - { name: "validate_ssot", command: "bash workflow/ssot-gen/scripts/check_ssot_disk.sh spi", description: "Validate SSOT schema/completeness" }
    - { name: "handoff_fl_model", command: "/ssot-fl-model spi", description: "Generate/reference FL model from SSOT" }
    - { name: "handoff_rtl", command: "/ssot-rtl spi", description: "Generate RTL implementation from SSOT" }
    - { name: "handoff_tb", command: "/ssot-tb spi", description: "Generate TB and regression harness from SSOT" }
    - { name: "handoff_sim_debug", command: "/wf sim_debug", description: "Waveform/debug analysis against SSOT observability contract" }
    - { name: "handoff_coverage", command: "/coverage spi", description: "Measure declared functional/cycle/code coverage goals" }
    - { name: "handoff_eda", command: "/syn spi && /sta spi && /pnr spi && /sta-post spi", description: "Produce synthesis/STA/PnR evidence" }
"
    }
  ]
}
